extraction.description: This screenshot shows the configuration panel for a conversational agent in UiPath Agent Builder, focused on the Appearance section. The panel includes model settings sliders for Temperature and Max. tokens per response, and text fields populated with a welcome title and welcome description. A button to edit starting prompts is also visible.
step_instructions: In the Welcome title field, enter "Hi! I'm your friendly advisor".
In the Welcome description field, enter "Let me tell you all the secrets!".
Click on "Edit starting prompts" to configure the agent's starting prompts.
